allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; $response = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -TimeoutSec 2 -ErrorAction Stop; $true } catch { $false }; if \($response\) { "Frontend is running on port 5173" } else { "Checking alternative ports..."; @\(5173..5181\) | ForEach-Object { $port = $_; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:$port" -TimeoutSec 1 -ErrorAction Stop; "✓ Frontend found on port $port" } catch {} } })
